rows: Custom mobile apps under your brand

items.question: Where is our data physically stored?
items.answer: Your meeting data is hosted in KSA-aligned infrastructure, keeping storage and access aligned with local business requirements.

items.question: How does Liblib Meet handle PDPL compliance?
items.answer: Liblib Meet is designed around mapped privacy controls, documentation, and operational practices that support PDPL-focused procurement reviews.

items.question: Can we deploy Liblib Meet on our own private network?
items.answer: Yes. The platform can support private network and on-premise deployment models for organizations with stricter infrastructure policies.

items.question: How customizable is the white-label experience?
items.answer: You can customize branding, app identity, and subdomain details so the meeting experience feels native to your organization.

items.question: What's the maximum meeting size?
items.answer: Meeting capacity depends on your deployment and package, with support available for larger organizational use cases.

items.question: How long does deployment take?
items.answer: Deployment timing depends on hosting, branding, compliance, and integration requirements. Most timelines are planned after discovery.

items.question: Do you support Arabic for AI features?
items.answer: Yes. Arabic-first workflows and AI features are part of the product experience for local teams.

items.question: What does pricing look like for a 1,000+ user organization?
items.answer: Enterprise pricing is scoped based on users, deployment model, support level, and customization requirements.

centerStage.title: Your brand, <highlight>center stage.</highlight>
centerStage.description: Don't just host a meeting - host an experience that feels unmistakably yours. Liblib Meet ships as a fully white-label platform you can shape down to the smallest detail.

items.title: Custom Subdomains

items.title: Visual Consistency

items.title: Custom Mobile Apps
items.description: Ship your own iOS and Android apps under your brand
